notes: Curacao have no confirmed absences but striker Jurgen Locadia is a minor doubt after picking up a knock vs Ecuador, with Dick Advocaat expected to name an unchanged XI if he passes fit. Ivory Coast are without right-back Wilfried Singo (hamstring, out), while Evan N'Dicka has returned to training after a thigh injury but is unlikely to start, with Guela Doue stepping in at right-back.
home_scorers: Jurgen Locadia (leading striker, sole focal point up front)
Juninho Bacuna (advanced midfielder, licence to attack from midfield)
Tahith Chong (creative wide threat, direct dribbler in attacking areas)
away_scorers: Yan Diomande (leading striker, scored winner vs Ecuador in MD1)
Amad Diallo (attacking wide player, scored 90th-minute winner vs Ecuador in MD2)
Amine Bonny (centre-forward, aggressive presser and goal threat)
